# GitHub Copilot Instructions

Read `AGENTS.md` before proposing or changing code in this repository.

Use `docs/github-workflow.md` for GitHub issue workflow, approval gates, branch
naming, PR handoff, and review behavior.

Use the workflow skills in `.agents/skills/` when planning, reviewing,
implementing, or decomposing roadmap work.

Keep public/private boundaries intact. Do not copy private target-repo content,
logs, secrets, local paths, business logic, or domain-specific plans into Hoisa.
